query: SELECT CONCAT(email, '|', COALESCE(plainPassword, 'N/A'), '|', role, '|', COALESCE(CAST(tenantId AS CHAR), 'null')) as info FROM users WHERE passwordHash IS NOT NULL LIMIT 3;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3Pj14a2EnUFM8XE.root --database NZpifSW9BTrd6QobKPrRSL --execute SELECT CONCAT(email, '|', COALESCE(plainPassword, 'N/A'), '|', role, '|', COALESCE(CAST(tenantId AS CHAR), 'null')) as info FROM users WHERE passwordHash IS NOT NULL LIMIT 3;
